splash.title: AI Novel Writing Studio
splash.subtitle: Preparing the desktop shell and the bundled local writing engine.

status.startingDetail: Preparing the desktop runtime and local workspace.
status.appReadyDetail: Electron is ready. Opening the desktop launch shell.
status.splashShownDetail: Preparing the desktop runtime and bundled assets.
status.startingServerDetailAfterRenderer: The launch shell is visible; waiting for the bundled local service to become ready.
status.startingServerDetail: Bringing up the local desktop service and preparing the user data directory.
status.loadingUiDetail: The local service is ready; rendering the first workspace screen.
status.workspaceReadyDetail: The launch shell, local service, and workspace interface are all ready.
status.mainWindowShownReady: The main window is now visible.
status.mainWindowShownPending: The main window is visible; the local service is still starting up.
status.importingLegacyDetail: Migrating the legacy web local database into the desktop data directory.

error.startupFailedTitle: AI Novel Writing Studio failed to start
error.startupFailedMessage: The desktop app was unable to finish initialization.
